title: cronlint conformance vector file
description: A language-neutral test contract for cronlint implementations. Each vector's `expect` array is the COMPLETE set of findings for the expression given the options; findings are matched on rule + severity (+ field when specified), order-insensitive. Messages and spans are presentation and are NOT part of the contract.

rule.description: The rule this file primarily exercises; 'syntax' and 'clean' for the two special files.

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier within the file.

expression.description: The cron expression under test, verbatim.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier passed as LintOptions.timezone.

expect.description: The complete, order-insensitive set of findings.

field.description: When present, the implementation's finding must carry this field. When absent, the field is unconstrained.
